title: Tameable Circuit Backport
description: Ever wanted a circuit pet but on 1.20.1 forge? Now you can :D
body:
- 1. **This mod requires Geckolib and (optionally) The broken script to work.**
- This is a backport of "Tameable circuit" mod for 1.20.1 that adds a tameable circuit. 
- To get one, you need to craft wire bread made out of 4 wires and 1 bread (Wires are made of black wool, 2 copper ingots, 1 iron nugget and 1 iron ingot.). Then, find a circuit mineshaft flee and right click it while holding wire bread. Hitboxes are reccomended to not miss circuit's hitbox. 
- Wires are made of black wool, 2 copper ingots, 1 iron nugget and 1 iron ingot. You can feed your circuit using wires or copper, regenerating him. You can also dye his hand collar using dyes, or making him entierly notexture using notexture dye.
- _What you can do with your circuit pet?_
- You can pat your circuit right clicking him, or you can feed your circuit using wires or copper, regenerating him. You can also dye his hand collar using dyes, or making him entierly notexture using notexture dye.
- **- Do note that circuit explodes on death in a big radius, also killing the players standing near.**
- Some features from the original mod like, calling circuits by their names is TBA.
- **- Credits: RedstoneWizard08 For the broken script, Bonfy for the original tameable circuits mod.**
